problem: Aurora audio conformance is the weakest current release axis, but the next work must distinguish true runtime cue gaps from broad or missing reference measurements.
strategy: Reuse the latest captured Aurora audio comparison metrics, rank event cues by active-duration/timbre/reference-window risk, and expose missing critical cue coverage before tuning.
successMeasure: The next audio cycle should reduce missing critical comparison coverage, narrow broad reference windows, and lower the highest-risk event cue gaps without regressing gameplay guardrails.

comparedCueRisks.label: Challenge Perfect
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether a perfect challenge result feels more celebratory than the standard results cue.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: A perfect challenge clear occurred; this should be more celebratory than the standard result.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: New Aurora cue slot added from the cue matrix.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Capture Beam

comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Strong direct mapping.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Enemy Shot
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether enemy fire is distinct enough from player fire and boss damage.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: An enemy threat entered play; the cue should not collapse into the player shot sound.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Measured coverage added for projectile feedback; current reference clip is shared and may still be too broad.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Split or label the shared reference source so enemyShot remains distinct from playerShot, attackCharge, enemyHit.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Player Shot
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether player fire reads as a quick arcade shot instead of a generic impact.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: The player acted; the shot should be quick, crisp, and distinct from impacts.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Measured coverage added for shot identity; current reference clip is shared and may still be too broad.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Split or label the shared reference source so playerShot remains distinct from enemyShot, enemyHit, bossHit.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Tune timbre/centroid after confirming event timing; current cue character is far from reference.

comparedCueRisks.label: Demo Pulse

comparedCueRisks.label: Boss Boom
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether boss destruction feels larger and more final than normal enemy destruction.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: A boss was destroyed; the cue should feel larger and more final than normal enemy destruction.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Measured coverage added for boss destruction feedback.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.

comparedCueRisks.label: Capture Retreat
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the post-capture retreat phase remains audible as a distinct state.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: The boss is leaving with the captured fighter; the captured state should remain legible.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Measured coverage added for the transition between beam danger and captured-fighter state.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Promote a narrower or cleaner semantic mapping before judging runtime synthesis quality.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Game Over
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether the ending cue feels final and emotionally complete enough.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: The run is over; the ending cue should feel final and emotionally complete.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Best current end-state reference; still broader than Aurora's single slot.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Keep semantic mapping as a guardrail while acoustic/timing gaps are tuned.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Keep as secondary pass after higher-risk audio gaps are narrowed.

comparedCueRisks.label: Enemy Hit
comparedCueRisks.focus: Compare whether an enemy impact gives immediate hit confirmation.
comparedCueRisks.playerMeaning: A hit connected; the player should hear immediate damage feedback before destruction hierarchy.
comparedCueRisks.mappingStatus: Measured coverage added for impact feedback; hit and kill hierarchy still needs refinement.
comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Split or label the shared reference source so enemyHit remains distinct from enemyBoom, bossHit, playerShot.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.

comparedCueRisks.semanticRecommendation: Split or label the shared reference source so enemyBoom remains distinct from enemyHit, bossBoom.
comparedCueRisks.recommendation: Prioritize impact/explosion event clarity so the player understands damage, kill, and boss multi-hit state.
